channel.title: Ric 20 on Ric - An unknown artist
channel.description: Recent content in Ric 20 on Ric - An unknown artist

item.title: A painting of Ric 20
item.description: Short description: This is a painting of the motive found on Ric 20 . The title is probably “Treppengasse”, which is in Altenburg , Germany. Since it’s a painting and not another copy of the etching, it get’s it’s own number (Ric 32). Notes: Found by Andra Robertson at an estate sale, send to me by mail. Image by Andra Robertson

item.title: Alley - Ric20
item.description: Short description: Notes: Taken from eBay . The title of the listing suggests Treppengasse, Altenburg , Germany. Image by Mark Strong of Meibohm Fine Arts . The description on eBay is very interesting, there is a post about it. Other entries for this work

item.title: Ric 20
item.description: Short description: An alley Notes: Other entries for this work
